title: Mexican Norte Tacos
description: A flavorful Mexican dish featuring Norte-style tacos with a twist. Perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: Infused bay leaves
ingredients.notes: use dried bay leaves for best flavor

instructions: 1. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
2. Add the Mexican dish spice blend to the skillet and stir to combine.
3. Add the infused bay leaves to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Warm the taco-sized corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
5. Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture onto a tortilla and topping with shredded cheese, sliced radishes, and chopped cilantro.
6. Serve immediately with lime wedges on the side.
